name: AsqAgeGroup
title: ASQ Age Group (local)
description: Age group used to interpret patient refusal during ASQ administration. Local code system; the age group can often be derived from Patient.birthDate and may be removed in a future revision. See ASQ pilot plan, Priority 3.

concept.definition: Patient age under 18 at time of screening. Per NIMH ASQ guidance, refusal in this population is treated as a non-acute positive screen.
Patient age 18 or older at time of screening. Refusal alone is not treated as positive unless other safety concerns are present.
